heading: Distributions
label: 1368 Distributions

children.heading: General rule
children.label: a General rule
children.text: A distribution of property made by an S corporation with respect to its stock to which (but for this subsection) section 301(c) would apply shall be treated in the manner provided in subsection (b) or (c), whichever applies.

children.heading: S corporation having no earnings and profits
children.label: b S corporation having no earnings and profits

children.heading: Amount applied against basis
children.label: 1 Amount applied against basis
children.text: The distribution shall not be included in gross income to the extent that it does not exceed the adjusted basis of the stock.

children.heading: Amount in excess of basis
children.label: 2 Amount in excess of basis
children.text: If the amount of the distribution exceeds the adjusted basis of the stock, such excess shall be treated as gain from the sale or exchange of property.

children.heading: S corporation having earnings and profits
children.label: c S corporation having earnings and profits

children.heading: Accumulated adjustments account
children.label: 1 Accumulated adjustments account
children.text: That portion of the distribution which does not exceed the accumulated adjustments account shall be treated in the manner provided by subsection (b).

children.heading: Dividend
children.label: 2 Dividend
children.text: That portion of the distribution which remains after the application of paragraph (1) shall be treated as a dividend to the extent it does not exceed the accumulated earnings and profits of the S corporation.

children.heading: Treatment of remainder
children.label: 3 Treatment of remainder
children.text: Any portion of the distribution remaining after the application of paragraph (2) of this subsection shall be treated in the manner provided by subsection (b).

children.heading: Certain adjustments taken into account
children.label: d Certain adjustments taken into account

children.text: the adjustments to the basis of the shareholder’s stock described in section 1367, and
the adjustments to the accumulated adjustments account which are required by subsection (e)(1).

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Except as otherwise provided in this paragraph, the term “accumulated adjustments account” means an account of the S corporation which is adjusted for the S period in a manner similar to the adjustments under section 1367 (except that no adjustment shall be made for income (and related expenses) which is exempt from tax under this title and the phrase “(but not below zero)” shall be disregarded in section 1367(a)(2)) and no adjustment shall be made for Federal taxes attributable to any taxable year in which the corporation was a C corporation.

children.heading: Amount of adjustment in the case of redemptions
children.label: B Amount of adjustment in the case of redemptions
children.text: In the case of any redemption which is treated as an exchange under section 302(a) or 303(a), the adjustment in the accumulated adjustments account shall be an amount which bears the same ratio to the balance in such account as the number of shares redeemed in such redemption bears to the number of shares of stock in the corporation immediately before such redemption.

children.heading: Net loss for year disregarded
children.label: C Net loss for year disregarded

children.heading: In general
children.label: i In general
children.text: In applying this section to distributions made during any taxable year, the amount in the accumulated adjustments account as of the close of such taxable year shall be determined without regard to any net negative adjustment for such taxable year.

children.label: I
children.text: the reductions in the account for the taxable year (other than for distributions), over

children.label: II
children.text: the increases in such account for such taxable year.

children.heading: S period
children.label: 2 S period
children.text: The term “S period” means the most recent continuous period during which the corporation has been an S corporation. Such period shall not include any taxable year beginning before .January 1, 1983

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: An S corporation may, with the consent of all of its affected shareholders, elect to have paragraph (1) of subsection (c) not apply to all distributions made during the taxable year for which the election is made.

children.heading: Affected shareholder
children.label: B Affected shareholder
children.text: For purposes of subparagraph (A), the term “affected shareholder” means any shareholder to whom a distribution is made by the S corporation during the taxable year.
shall be includible in gross income of the director, and
shall be deductible by the corporation for the taxable year of such corporation in which or with which ends the taxable year in which such amount is included in the gross income of the director.
